person.name: Bohdan Ilienko
person.title: Full Stack Engineer
person.professionalSummary: Full Stack Engineer with 3.5 years of experience and a Computer Science degree, delivering end-to-end web and mobile applications. Skilled in TypeScript, NestJS, React, and React Native, with practical experience in system design, API development, mobile deployment (Expo, EAS), and CI/CD.

chatbotOwnership.note: Bohdan implemented and maintains the portfolio chatbot and its RAG integration

highlights: Develop and maintain internal services and tooling using TypeScript/Node.js/NestJS
Build and evolve REST APIs, background jobs, and service integrations

Participate in code reviews, refactoring, and CI/CD-driven delivery (Docker, GitHub Actions)
Delivered features for internal web systems across backend and frontend (JavaScript, Express.js)
Implemented and maintained session-based auth and access control
Improved quality with refactoring, reviews, and test coverage (unit/integration/e2e; Jest/Mocha)
Optimized PostgreSQL/MongoDB queries/indexing and resolved production regressions
Collaborated on planning, estimates, and stable release cycles
Built and supported internal web applications and implemented backend REST endpoints
Improved performance and stability with profiling and query optimization
Reviewed and refactored legacy modules to improve maintainability and reduce technical debt
Contributed to delivery planning, code-review conventions, and release support
